summary: Testing TAREA E12 - Food search (Buscador de alimentos) features. All 7 requested features verified working. Backend API tests passed 12/12. Frontend code verified for correct implementation.
passed_tests: ✅ Accent normalization: 'atun' finds 'Atún' - API test passed
✅ Accent normalization: 'jamon' finds 'Jamón' - API test passed
✅ Accent normalization: 'salmon' finds 'Salmón' - API test passed
✅ Macros efectivos returned in search results - API test passed
✅ Arroz (cat 21) shows P=0 effective (only H counts) - API test passed
✅ Pechuga with G<3% shows G=0 effective - API test passed
✅ Search limit set to 50 results - API test passed
✅ Category filtering works (tested cat 2 Carnes, cat 21 Arroces) - API test passed
✅ Food ración varies per item (not hardcoded 100g) - API test passed
✅ que_cuenta field returned showing which macros count - API test passed
✅ Categories endpoint returns list - API test passed
✅ 23 category chips in CATEGORY_CHIPS array - Code verified
✅ Macro badges only shown if value > 0 (pEf > 0 && ...) - Code verified
✅ Ración display uses food.racion not hardcoded 100g - Code verified

1_accent_normalization.details: normalize_text() function in calculator.py removes accents using unicodedata. Searches 'atun', 'jamon', 'salmon' all return correct results with accents.

2_effective_macros.details: calcular_efectivos=True parameter added to buscar_alimentos(). Arroz shows P=0 (cat 21), Pechuga with G<3% shows G=0.

3_categories_23.details: CATEGORY_CHIPS array has exactly 23 entries: Todas, Huevos, Carnes, Pescados, Proteína, Lácteos, Cereales, Panes, Tubérculos, Legumbres, Frutas, Verduras, Salsas, Grasas, F.Secos, Arroces, Pasta, Beb.Veg, Vegano, Cacao, Snacks, Sopas, Comida Prep

4_correct_ration.details: Frontend displays {racion}g / 1 ración using food.racion value from API, not hardcoded 100g.

5_search_limit_50.details: API endpoint /api/calculator/search uses limit=50 as default. Verified in test.

6_hide_zero_macros.details: Frontend code uses {pEf > 0 && ...} pattern to only show macro badges when value > 0.

7_category_filtering.details: API category filter correctly filters by category prefix. Frontend chips pass category value to search.

seed_data_creation: Existing test data used from previous iteration
context_for_next_testing_agent: All TAREA E12 food search features verified working. Backend API tests in /app/backend/tests/test_food_search.py cover accent normalization, macros efectivos, search limits, and category filtering. Frontend code verified to have 23 categories, correct ración display, and macro badge visibility logic.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working as expected. No bugs found.
